dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5663 RH: ACPAC Modernization Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Titus (for herself and Mr. Bilirakis) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on September 30, 2025

form.official-title: To modify the termination of the aviation consumer protection advisory committee, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the ACPAC Modernization Act.
Section 411 of the FAA Modernization and Reform Act of 2012 (49 U.S.C. 42301 prec. note) is amended—

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (3) by striking ; and and inserting a semicolon;
in paragraph (4) by striking the period and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: in subsection (i) by striking ticket agents,.

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
